name: Liptauer Cheese
recipeIngredient: 2 fillets Anchovy fillets, rinsed, dried and minced
Crackers or toast points as accompaniment
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, cream together the softened cream cheese and butter until smooth.
2. Add sweet paprika, capers, minced anchovies, shallot, caraway seeds, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Mix well to combine all ingredients thoroughly.
4. Pack the mixture into a crock and cover with plastic wrap.
5. Chill for at least 1 day to allow flavors to meld.
6. Serve the Liptauer cheese with crackers or toast points.
from Lipto, Hungary; a 1947 Gourmet Magazine favorite.
